title: wedelia acapulcensis var. ayerscottiana
intro: Wedelia acapulcensis var. ayerscottiana, also known as Mexican dandelion or Buttercup flower, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Wedelia acapulcensis var. ayerscottiana include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help reduce stress, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in traditional medicine to make poultices, salves, and topical creams for wound healing and skin conditions.
